    A

    add(Vec2) - Method in class gmaths.Vec2
    Adds the supplied vector v to this vector and stores the result in this vector.
    add(Vec2, Vec2) - Static method in class gmaths.Vec2
    Adds the supplied vectors (a+b) and returns the resulting vector.

    D

    dotProduct(Vec2) - Method in class gmaths.Vec2
    Calculates the dot product between this vector and the supplied vector
    dotProduct(Vec2, Vec2) - Static method in class gmaths.Vec2
    Calculates the dot product between vectors a and b and returns the result.

    L

    Calculates and returns the length of the vector.
    length() - Method in class gmaths.Vec3
     
    lookAt(Vec3, Vec3, Vec3) - Static method in class gmaths.Mat4Transform
    Creates a view matrix corresponding to a camera at a given position, looking at a particular target point, with a specified worldup direction.

    Calculates and returns the magnitude of the vector.

    Calculates and returns the magnitude of the vector.

    A static class for a set of methods to create transformation matrices.

    multiply(float) - Method in class gmaths.Vec2
    Each component of this vector is multiplied by f.

    Each component of the vector v is multiplied by f.

    N

    normalize() - Method in class gmaths.Vec2
    Normalizes the vector.
    normalize() - Method in class gmaths.Vec3
     
    normalize(Vec2) - Static method in class gmaths.Vec2
    Normalizes the vector that is supplied a parameter and returns the new normalized vector as the result.
    normalize(Vec3) - Static method in class gmaths.Vec3
     

    P

    perspective(float, float) - Static method in class gmaths.Mat4Transform
    Creates a perspective matrix with near clip plane at 0.1f and far clip plane at 100f.
    perspective(float, float, float, float) - Static method in class gmaths.Mat4Transform
    Creates a perspective matrix.

    R

    rotateAroundX(float) - Static method in class gmaths.Mat4Transform
    Creates a 4x4 rotation matrix to rotate around the X axis.
    rotateAroundY(float) - Static method in class gmaths.Mat4Transform
    Creates a 4x4 rotation matrix to rotate around the Y axis.
    rotateAroundZ(float) - Static method in class gmaths.Mat4Transform
    Creates a 4x4 rotation matrix to rotate around the Z axis.

    Creates a 4x4 scale matrix

    Creates a 4x4 scale matrix

    Subtracts the supplied vector v from this vector and stores the result in this vector
